prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，农林类专业热度一般；本省2026年高考总人数474900人，较2025年472480人略有增加，按近年物理类占比约56.4%估算，物理类考生约267844人，较2025年增加约1419人，竞争略有加剧；该校位于陕西（非本省），江西省考生报考外省985，无显著地域偏好偏向；该校在江西省招生占比约2.5%–3%，属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年计划扩招15.8%的缓解效应、本省考生小幅增加及学校排名持续上升的吸引力增强，预计2026年最低位次，预测最低位次约17974名，区间17474–18474名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 12585 → 13787 → 13689 → 13205 → 16601, with a significant backward shift in 2025, moving back about 3396 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 16601; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 56 in 2021, 64 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 66 in 2024, and 76 in 2025, expanding year by year; the 2026 plan is 88, an increase of 12 (+15.8%) from 2025, a relatively large expansion, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, with a steady improvement in ranking, enhancing attractiveness to candidates; in 2022, there was a negative reputation incident due to teacher academic misconduct, but no significant negative public opinion has been seen in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 75th (average), short video exposure is average, with no abnormal signals of application popularity; no record of enrollment gaps; 4 A- disciplines: Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science, all with agricultural and forestry characteristics and advantages, highly related to the university's enrollment majors, providing stable support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended with social heat, while agricultural and forestry majors have average popularity; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 474,900, a slight increase from 472,480 in 2025, with an estimated physics category proportion of about 56.4%, resulting in about 267,844 physics category candidates, an increase of about 1,419 from 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the university is located in Shaanxi (not the home province), and Jiangxi candidates applying for out-of-province 985 universities have no significant regional preference bias; the university's enrollment share in Jiangxi is about 2.5%–3%, at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the easing effect of a 15.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, a slight increase in provincial candidates, and the continuous rise in the university's ranking, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 17,974, with a range of 17,474–18,474.
